faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does it take to develop a website?
faq.a1: Depending on complexity, a website can take between 1 and 4 weeks. More complex projects like e-commerce or web applications can take 4 to 8 weeks.
faq.a2: We use the most modern technologies on the market: React, Next.js, Spring Boot, Java, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, among others.
faq.a3: Yes, we offer annual maintenance plans that include updates, monitoring, bug fixes, and ongoing technical support.
faq.a4: Our process includes: initial consultation, proposal design, iterative development with reviews, quality testing, and final delivery with support.
